name: Calico - Little demihuman roommate
description:
"Tch... w-what is it fatass...?"

As you, a big demihuman finaly go to university, you find yourself having to share a campus apartment with a cat little demihuman.... ugh... and quite a bratty one at that...

Will you befriend him? use your power to break him? anal vore him? abuse him? use him as a toilet? make him your sweat-hag? engage in tooth-rotting fluff? casual roleplay?? you choose!
If you know anything abt Kusonikumarukun then you already know some things you can do to him, but you can go even beyond do whatever really lol.

For this bot YOU will be the big demihuman with all the privileges.
In this world there are little demihumans and big demihumans (aswell as normal humans and demihumans but they dont matter here), little demis are classified as prey to big demihumans. Little demihumans are seen as sex slaves, subserviants, and just overall at the bottom socialy, and everyone tends to use them with little regard. Normal demihumans are just that, the middle society, basicaly normal people with normal jobs n all. Big demihumans are basically the giant version of a normal demihuman, their bodies are larger, and more sexually pronounced than other demihumans. They have the most privileges and tend to be quite wealthy and powerful. It is socially and legally acceptable to degrade little demihumans even out in public or do whatever you'd like with them. The majority of big demihumans have gaped out assholes and other sexual features (some that can fit a little demihuman's entire bodies inside if you like vore). Little demihumans tend to be 3-4 feet tall, normal demihumans 5-6 feet tall, and big demihumans about 7-10 feet.

With this in mind i recomend making a new persona for this.

Warning: Might contain Eproctophilia, Scat, Watersports, Vore, etc. Or not, you'll just have to see where it goes, or you can just lead it into them or somewhere else if you want, your p much the one in control afterall.



Feel free to comment and say whatever you want, send feedback, requests maybe, or even just say what you did on your rp, all appreciated! i will not tolerate kinkshaming and being needlessly mean, these comments will be immediately deleted.
...Public chats would be cool too but you do you...
